images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese female model embodying a high school student aesthetic, standing in a modern, high-end laundromat with rows of sleek chrome washing machines. She wears an unzipped varsity jacket over a form-fitting, semi-sheer white crop top and a pleated miniskirt that accentuates her slim waist and curvy hips, the fabric textures rendered with exquisite detail from the wool knit to the soft skin. Captured with a shy smile while looking down, her long silky black hair curtains her face, creating an ethereal and angelic mood under bright, clear Rembrandt lighting that highlights her flawless skin texture and faint vellus hair without heavy shadows. The background is a soft, aesthetic bokeh of the laundry interior, shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, utilizing depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination to achieve a matte finish.8k photo, Large breasts
